POST AutocompleteSearch2/ajaxSearch_sarana_rujuk/(.*)/(.*) \App\Controllers\AutocompleteSearch2::ajaxSearch_sarana_rujuk/$1/$2
PUT lab/m_hasil_u/(.*) \App\Controllers\diagnostic\M_hasil::update/$1
DELETE lab/periksa_hps/(.*) \App\Controllers\diagnostic\Entri::hapus_d/$1
CLI ci(.*) \CodeIgniter\CLI\CommandRunner::index/$1
